subject: Jon, your support could change one more life this year
body:
Dear Jon,

As someone who sought us out directly, you understood our mission from the very beginning — and that means everything.

With 14 donations on record, you are one of our most dedicated supporters. Your last gift was about 89 days ago, and its impact is still being felt.

The girls in our safehouses are making real progress — in their education, their health, and their sense of safety. But there are always more young women who need a place like Lunas Foundation.

We are reaching out personally because donors like you — engaged, consistent, and mission-aligned — are exactly who we rely on when we want to do more.

Would you consider a monthly gift of PHP 700? At that level, you would directly fund one girl's school supplies and wellness check for an entire month.

This is not a mass appeal. We are asking you specifically because your history of giving tells us you care deeply about this work.

To make your next gift or adjust your giving level, simply reply to this email or visit our donation page. We will personally follow up.

With gratitude,

The Lunas Foundation Team
hello@lunasfoundation.org

---
You are receiving this personal note because you are a valued supporter of Lunas Foundation.
To update your communication preferences, reply to this email.

subject: Ethan, your support could change one more life this year
body:
Dear Ethan,

Ever since you connected with us at one of our events, your support has been a reminder of why this work matters.

You have given 5 times. That kind of consistency is rare and deeply appreciated. Your last gift was about 64 days ago, and its impact is still being felt.

The girls in our safehouses are making real progress — in their education, their health, and their sense of safety. But there are always more young women who need a place like Lunas Foundation.

We are reaching out personally because donors like you — engaged, consistent, and mission-aligned — are exactly who we rely on when we want to do more.

This is not a mass appeal. We are asking you specifically because your history of giving tells us you care deeply about this work.

subject: You've made a difference, Ethan — can you help us go further?
body:

As someone who sought us out directly, you understood our mission from the very beginning — and that means everything.

You've supported us 7 times — that consistency means everything to the girls we serve. Your last gift was 45 days ago, and its impact is still being felt every single day.

subject: Ethan, you've changed everything for these girls
body:
Hi Ethan,

You've shown up 9 times for the girls at Lunas Foundation.
That kind of consistency doesn't go unnoticed — it's what keeps our
doors open and our girls safe.

Your generosity has gone directly toward general operations — helping
girls who had nowhere else to turn find stability, education, and hope.

We'd love to invite you to go one step further this month. Even a small
increase in your gift makes a measurable difference.

With deep gratitude,
The Lunas Foundation Team

subject: Because of you, Ethan — here's what happened
body:
Hi Ethan,

You've given 4 times to Lunas Foundation, and we want
you to know exactly what that's meant.

Your support has helped fund general operations for girls who needed
it most. Every contribution you've made has been felt.

Would you consider giving again this month? Your next gift continues
what you've already started.

Thank you for being part of this,
The Lunas Foundation Team

subject: Ethan, your first gift already made a difference
body:
Hi Ethan,

Thank you for your first gift to Lunas Foundation. It meant more
than you know.

Your donation went toward general operations — directly supporting
girls in our care who needed exactly that kind of help.

We'd love for this to be the start of something. Would you consider
giving again? Even once more doubles your impact.

So glad you found us,
The Lunas Foundation Team

subject: We've been thinking of you, Ethan
body:
Hi Ethan,

It's been a little while since we've heard from you, and we just
wanted to reach out.

A lot has happened at Lunas Foundation since your last gift.
Girls have found safety, started school, and begun rebuilding
their lives — in part because of supporters like you.

Whenever you're ready, we'd love to welcome you back.
No pressure — just gratitude.

Warmly,
The Lunas Foundation Team

subject: You're making a difference, Maria
body:
Maria,

You are making a difference. We are so grateful for your commitment to these girls. You are one of our best supporters — your 7 heartfelt donations have helped fund Education, supported girls through some of their hardest moments, and kept our doors open for those who need us most.

We are growing more than ever and working to reach more girls across the Philippines. Right now we are in need of funding for Education, and even a donation of PHP 1,000 would help us get closer to our goal. Anything you give goes a long way to protecting our girls.

Donate here: https://lunas-project.site/donate

— Lunas Project

subject: Carlo, your gift is already making an impact
body:
Carlo,

You are making a difference. Thank you for your generous gift to Lunas Foundation — it means more than you know. Your donation has gone toward Wellbeing, directly supporting girls who had nowhere else to turn.

We are growing and working hard to reach even more girls who need us. A donation of PHP 1,000 would help us continue that work. Every contribution, no matter the size, goes directly to protecting and empowering the girls in our care.

Donate here: https://lunas-project.site/donate

— Lunas Project

subject: We miss you, Ana
body:
Ana,

You made a difference — and we haven't forgotten it. Your past generosity helped fund Operations and supported girls during some of their most vulnerable moments. That gift mattered then, and it still matters now.

A lot has happened since your last donation. We are reaching more girls than ever and growing every month — but we need supporters like you to keep going. Even a gift of PHP 500 would help us continue the work you helped start.

Donate here: https://lunas-project.site/donate

— Lunas Project
